items.title: 信任作为协议
items.author: Quanta Magazine + 爱思想
items.summary: 量子密钥与朝贡礼仪：两种不依赖实力的安全机制
highlights: I was trapped, so I listened politely.
封贡关系的要义是「事大」与「字小」
items.thoughts: 安全可以来自结构而非力量——量子物理和东亚秩序各自证明了这一点

items.title: 平衡的魔法
items.author: Quanta Magazine + 春分民俗
items.summary: 混乱如何收敛为秩序，春分如何成为平衡的隐喻
highlights: No matter how irregular a random process is, even if it is impossible to model, the average of many outcomes has the distribution that it describes.
春分到，蛋儿俏
items.thoughts: 混沌收敛为秩序，天地运行到平衡——数学家和古人看到的是同一件事

items.title: The Bureaucracy of Gods and Robots
items.author: Quanta Magazine + Soushenji
items.summary: When systems get complicated, they get rigid — whether in machine bodies or divine courts.
highlights: To have robots which work like humans, I think we have to master physics.
生死异路，不可相近。
久别乡里，自忻得还，又遇酒食充足，实念诸孙，召之。
items.thoughts: Whether made of metal or ectoplasm, complex systems have the same failure mode: capabilities outrunning controls.

items.title: 分形时空：最保守的激进想法
items.author: Quanta Magazine (Charlie Wood)
items.summary: 如果尺度对称存在，量子场论不需要被推翻，只需要被延伸
highlights: 时空本身就有对称性——没有特殊方向、没有特殊位置。但我们有特殊尺度。这很奇怪。
渐近安全是量子引力领域最保守的激进想法
If someone had made these as actual predictions back then, maybe asymptotic safety would be the largely established view of quantum gravity.
items.thoughts: 最保守的方法往往最激进——不是推翻框架，而是追问框架在何种条件下依然成立

items.title: Why Do Humanoid Robots Still Struggle With the Small Stuff?
items.author: John Pavlus (Quanta Magazine)
items.summary: 人形机器人在大动作上进步巨大，但精细操作仍然困难。核心问题不是AI不够聪明，而是还没掌握力的物理学。
highlights: To have robots which work like humans, I think we have to master physics.
Force as a first-class citizen is absolutely required.
We're in the Volta stage — using AI to make robots work before we understand how it works.
items.thoughts: Position tells you WHERE to go. Force tells you HOW to touch. LLMs mastered the former; the latter remains unsolved.

items.title: 论清代边疆治理
items.author: 吕文利
items.summary: 《礼记》的「修其教不易其俗，齐其政不易其宜」不只是因俗而治，更是因俗而治+修教齐政的两阶段治理逻辑
highlights: 因俗而治是起点，修教齐政是目的
康熙帝：修德安民，喀尔喀即长城
乾隆：众建以分其势
items.thoughts: 妥协是智慧，改革也是智慧；关键在于知道什么时候该妥协，什么时候该改革

items.title: Where Some See Strings, She Sees a Space-Time Made of Fractals
items.author: Charlie Wood (采访 Astrid Eichhorn)
items.summary: Quanta专访物理学家Astrid Eichhorn，探讨渐近安全理论如何用分形结构取代弦论和圈量子引力来解决量子引力问题
highlights: OMG图：定点存在时，top和bottom夸克必须有不同质量
最保守的量子引力：不改变粒子或时空，只添加尺度对称
谦逊：弦论和圈量子引力可能是同一物理的不同视角
items.thoughts: 理论的价值在于可被证伪，而非不可动摇

items.title: Nth Country Experiment: 三个学生如何设计出原子弹
items.author: Jake Currie (Nautilus)
items.summary: 1964年五角大楼的绝密实验：三个不懂核物理的博士后从零设计原子弹，三年后成功。证明核扩散的真正壁垒不是知识，而是材料。
highlights: The big advantage we had over Fermi and Teller was that we knew it could work.
If it had been constructed, it would have made a pretty impressive bang — on the same order of magnitude as Hiroshima.
items.thoughts: 知识民主化是双刃剑。Atoms for Peace 的信息公开帮助了和平核能，也帮助了这三个学生。

items.title: 龙抬头为何在二月二 | 节日是被建构的
items.author: 北大文研讲座 276｜辛德勇

items.title: The Lonely Runner Problem | 简单猜��的深层等价

items.title: 比太阳更古老的晶体 + 二月二龙抬头的误会
混乱与秩序 / 人比鬼更可怕

items.title: 量子力学一百年：我们仍然不知道现实是什么
